subject: WM-0115 review: changes_requested
body: High: hardcoded-string inventory remains incomplete. docs/04_content_balance/13_m8_translation_inventory.md omits diagnostics-only English literals from apps/web/src/shell-bootstrap.ts:257 (Diagnostic package exported) and apps/web/src/web-storage-gate.ts:63/143/170/264/442 (Checking OPFS; save slot(s) visible in OPFS.; Deleted the local gate save.; Loaded <last input>; Selected entity <id> is not present in the current gate fixture.). Visible diagnostic panels are gated by wmDiagnostics=1, but inventory completeness is still not satisfied.
